what_it_does: An interpretive ledger record for the claude-ds analysis README.md.json: it restates the file's role as the method reference for the design-DNA analysis layer, captures its workflow, analytical lens, governing principles, provisional findings, and self-assessment metadata.
observations: It records that the source README opens by deferring new sessions to analysis/HANDOFF.md and positions itself as a method reference rather than a complete briefing.
It restates the analysis layer's mandate: reconstruct the generative rules behind the material in ingest/ without changing the design system.
It captures the 'images are evidence of a system, not a style to copy' principle and the 'ratios-not-pixels' extraction rule.
It lists the 6-step per-folder workflow (Ingest -> Analyse -> Diff -> Log gaps -> Update progress -> Synthesise) and the 9-level analytical lens.

It notes the proposed folder order and provisional key findings from the first five samples, including warm-white zoning, a faint blueprint ghost, a gold-to-bronze-to-brown accent gradient, premium warm photography, thin icons, embedded affordances, and surface ratios.
It includes evaluative metadata such as standouts, conventions, concerns, questions, purpose_vs_actual, apparent_themes, intention_signals, novelty, contribution, and embedding summaries.
It repeats the file's own question about why the canonical baseline deck is left ambiguous here when PROGRESS.md later names deck1-2026 the canonical master.
standouts: The 'system-not-style' framing and the 'ratios-not-pixels' rule are treated as the governing axioms.
The 9-level lens is presented as a fixed analytical grammar applied uniformly to every folder.
The explicit evidence-before-synthesis gate that forbids promotion into the design system until multi-sample confirmation.
The README is named as an entry point but deliberately sends readers to HANDOFF.md for the full briefing.
conventions: analysis-is-not-mutation: the layer only reconstructs rules, never edits the design system.
ratios-not-pixels: rules are expressed as relationships that recompute across sizes.
evidence-before-synthesis: universals are promoted only after confirmation through diff and gap logging.
fixed-lens analysis: the same 9-level lens is applied uniformly to every folder.
single-home routing: gaps, progress, and briefing each have one designated target file.
self-aware metadata: the ledger entry includes purpose_vs_actual, novelty, contribution, and embedding fields.
concerns: The provisional first-five-sample findings could be mistaken for settled conclusions if skimmed.
The README is named as the entry point but explicitly sends readers elsewhere for the complete briefing.
The canonical baseline deck is left ambiguous in this record, which the file itself flags as a question.
notes: A structured interpretive snapshot of the analysis-layer method reference, capturing its workflow, lens, principles, and self-flagged limitations.
questions: Should the provisional first-five-sample findings be refreshed once confirmed values exist elsewhere?
Is the canonical baseline deck intentionally unspecified here to avoid premature commitment?
purpose_vs_actual: Match — the ledger entry states it is an interpretive record of a method-reference README and delivers a structured restatement of that method, its principles, workflow, lens, and self-assessment metadata.
intention_signals: Inferred: the file is trying to document and preserve the reverse-engineering discipline of the analysis layer — treating mockups as evidence of an underlying generative system, applying a uniform analytical lens, and gating synthesis so downstream tokens and primitives remain grounded.
novelty: It codifies design analysis as a formal, evidence-gated reverse-engineering pipeline with a fixed 9-level lens and explicit no-mutation/no-synthesis-before-evidence rules, captured as structured interpretive metadata.
contribution: Contributes a structured interpretation of the analysis method — its workflow, lens, principles, and gating rules — as a ledger record that a fused system could keep for understanding how design evidence is turned into grounded, size-independent rules.
summary_for_embedding: Interpretive ledger record for the claude-ds analysis README.md.json, summarizing the analysis layer's method reference: system-not-style, ratios-not-pixels, a 6-step per-folder workflow, a fixed 9-level analytical lens, and an evidence-before-synthesis gate.
intention_for_embedding: Intended to preserve and communicate the disciplined reverse-engineering method used to extract generative design rules from source images as ratios, preventing premature or imitative synthesis into the design system.
